description: human error message with context and next step
input:
class Signup
  include ActiveModel::Model
  include ActiveModel::Attributes

  attribute :email, :string

  validates :email, presence: { message: "can't be blank — we need it to create your account" }

  def save
    return false unless valid?
    Identity.create!(email: email)
  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotUnique
    errors.add(:email, "looks like it's already taken. Did you mean to sign in?")
    false
  end
end
